inflicting_side: Sarajevo Romanija Corps (Army of Republika Srpska)
formula_note: Direct carry-through of the legal-source civilian death count.
uncertainty_note: Indictment-period window only; does not represent the whole siege.
quality_note: Good side attribution to SRK; victim-side community intentionally left null.

formula_note: Residual of total killed minus identified civilians: 3,798 - 1,399 = 2,399. Residual kept in unknown-status rather than assigned to military.
uncertainty_note: Residual likely includes combatants and possibly other statuses; it is not silently reclassified.
Assumes the troop count is subtracted from the inhabitants figure to avoid double-counting and held constant across the window.
quality_note: Exposure estimate is explicit and transparent but still a fixed-window proxy.

victim_side: Army of Bosnia and Herzegovina (inside Sarajevo)
uncertainty_note: Assumes a constant in-city troop strength across the indictment-period window.
quality_note: Reasonable as a transparent proxy but not a force-time series.

formula_note: 539 total deaths × 0.495 civilian share = 266.805, rounded to 267.
uncertainty_note: Civilian/combatant split comes from source summary language; actor attribution for the aggregate remains unspecified.
quality_note: Good derived split, but not actor-attributed at aggregate level.

formula_note: 539 total deaths × 0.505 combatant share = 272.195, rounded to 272.
uncertainty_note: Combatant-side composition is not broken out further and no troop exposure denominator was located.
quality_note: Useful combatant death count, but insufficient for DR without exposure.

victim_side: Bosnian Muslim civilians in East Mostar
uncertainty_note: Uses a fixed March 1994 East Mostar Muslim population as a siege-period proxy.
quality_note: Transparent exposure proxy; highly sensitive to displacement and siege-duration assumptions.

victim_side: Bosnian Muslim civilians in East Mostar
formula_note: Direct carry-through of the indictment's killed-or-wounded civilian figure.
uncertainty_note: This is not a death-only count and is therefore auxiliary rather than core DR input.
quality_note: Strong side attribution, but mixed killed/wounded wording prevents conversion into deaths.

formula_note: Direct floor from the tribunal-linked special page ('more than 7,000').
uncertainty_note: Conservative floor only; the source does not classify each victim by combatant status.
quality_note: Very strong perpetrator and victim-side attribution; status classification remains unresolved.
